label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking if following a series of instructions will bring me back to the starting point. Let me break down the steps one by one. Turn around: Turning around means rotating 180 degrees. From North, turning around would make me face South. 2. Turn left: From South, a left turn would be 90 degrees to the left.
